title: Fibonacci Number
statement: Write a program that calculates the nth Fibonacci number.
input: The input is an integer n (0 <= n <= 10^6).
output: The output is the nth Fibonacci number.
constraints: Use a constant amount of memory and time.

title: Array Sorting
statement: Write a program that sorts an array of integers in ascending order.
input: The input is an array of integers A of size N (0 < N <= 1000).
output: The output is the sorted array A.
constraints: Use a sorting algorithm that has a worst-case time complexity of O(N log N).

samples.explanation: The array is sorted in ascending order.
The array is sorted in ascending order.

title: String Palindrome
statement: Write a program that checks if a given string is a palindrome.
input: The input is a string S (0 < |S| <= 1000), consisting of lowercase English letters.
output: The output is a boolean value: true if S is a palindrome, and false otherwise.
constraints: Solve the problem in O(N) time complexity and O(1) space complexity.

samples.explanation: The string is the same read forwards and backwards.
The string is not the same read forwards and backwards.
The string is a single character, so it is a palindrome.
